title: The Present - OFFICIAL
description: A boy prefers video games but his mother gives him a puppy that changes his perspective.
choiceLine: A young gamer meets an unexpected companion who changes his world.
summary: An award-winning short where a video game-obsessed boy receives a gift that challenges his way of seeing.

title: CGI Animated Short Film "Alike"
description: In a gray city, a father and son navigate the tension between conformity and creativity.
choiceLine: A working dad learns to colour outside the lines with his son.
summary: A father and son in a monochrome city discover the cost of losing one's imagination.

title: One-Minute Time Machine - The Short Film that (probably) helped Rick & Morty win an Emmy
description: A man repeatedly uses a time-travel device to woo a woman, with darkly comic results.
choiceLine: What if you could redo the last minute... until you can't?
summary: A hapless suitor uses a one-minute time machine to impress a woman, discovering the perils of rewinding time.

title: Validation
description: A parking attendant gives compliments and free validations, changing lives until he meets a woman he can't make smile.
choiceLine: A guy's smile is contagious... until he meets someone immune.
summary: This feel-good fable follows a man who can cheer everyone up except the woman he loves.

title: TUCK ME IN
description: A father tucks his son in bed, but a chilling request reveals something horrifying.
choiceLine: A bedtime routine turns into a nightmare in just 60 seconds.
summary: A one-minute horror short where a child's plea forces his father to question what’s real.

title: Alma short film
description: Curiosity draws a girl into a mysterious toy shop on a snowy day.
choiceLine: A little girl discovers a doll that looks just like her.
summary: An eerie animated tale of a young girl lured into a doll shop with an unsettling secret.

title: The Maker - This beautiful animation will shatter your heart
description: A creature races against time to complete his greatest creation.
choiceLine: A race against the clock to craft a life.
summary: A stop-motion masterpiece about a creature compelled to build another before his own time runs out.

title: THE ANSWERS - By Michael Goode and Daniel Lissing
description: In the afterlife, a man gets to know the answers to all the questions he ever had about his life.
choiceLine: What if you could get answers to everything after you die?
summary: After a fatal accident, a man meets a clerk who can answer any question he has about his past.

title: CGI Animated Short Film "Sweet Cocoon" by ESMA | CGMeetup
description: Two insects help a determined caterpillar squeeze into her cocoon.
choiceLine: Helping someone grow isn't always graceful.
summary: A charming animation where two bugs assist a plump caterpillar in an amusing struggle to transform.

title: In a Heartbeat - Animated Short Film
channelName: In a Heartbeat Animated Short Film
description: A closeted boy literally follows his heart when it pops out of his chest to chase the boy of his dreams.
choiceLine: Sometimes your heart has a mind of its own.
summary: This heartwarming short depicts a boy’s heart chasing after his crush, revealing his feelings in the process.

title: Caminandes 3: Llamigos
description: Koro the llama and his penguin friend battle the winter elements to find food.
choiceLine: A llama and a penguin go fishing in the snow.
summary: In this silent short, a llama and his new penguin pal brave icy terrain in search of berries.

title: CGI Animated Short Film "Caminandes Gran Dillama" by Blender Animation Studio | CGMeetup
description: Koro the llama gets into trouble when a barrier blocks his way across the road.
choiceLine: A determined llama faces off against an unfriendly gate.
summary: A humorous chase ensues when a llama attempts to cross a farmer’s fence and meets his match.

title: Coin Operated - Animated Short Film
description: A boy’s lifelong dream of space travel is reignited by a coin-operated rocket ride.
choiceLine: A coin, a rocket ride and a 70-year dream.
summary: This charming animation follows a boy who never gives up on his childhood dream of reaching the stars.

title: The Neighbors' Window - Oscar Winning Short Film
description: A woman with young children becomes obsessed with watching her free-spirited young neighbours across the street.
choiceLine: Looking through someone else’s window changes how you see your own life.
summary: An overwhelmed mother envies her carefree neighbors until an unexpected encounter changes her outlook.
